response.justification: Bogdan Szabo lacks the required C++ development experience on Windows platforms (mandatory for this role) and domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking. While he has extensive software development experience across multiple languages and domains, none align closely with the specified technical stack or industry requirements.
strengths: Demonstrated software craftsmanship and polyglot programming skills across multiple languages (C++, D, TypeScript, Java, etc.)
Experience with backend development, CI/CD, and test-driven development (TDD)
Strong problem-solving abilities and contributions to open-source projects
concerns: No direct experience with C++ on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Most recent roles focus on web/mobile development and AI infrastructure, not financial systems

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income
